meaning: n.<美俚>兼勤杂工作的办事员
examples: They call me the gofer—go for this, go for that...
Gofer puts the plate into the oven.
Gofer breaks the eggs into the flour.
The only work he could find was as a gofer in the office of a Dubai cleaning company.
During a job interview at his law firm, O'Quinn looked past Isgur's two years in prison, judged him a smart kid with a good heart and gave him a job as a gofer.
